nodes.name: Velvet-mantled drongo
nodes.summary: The velvet-mantled drongo (Dicrurus modestus) is a species of bird in the family Dicruridae. It is found throughout the Cameroon line and the African tropical rainforest. References Gill, F and D Donsker (Eds). 2012. IOC World Bird Names (v 2.11). Available at http://www.worldbirdnames.org/ [Accessed 2/27/2012].

nodes.name: Dicrurus
nodes.summary: Dicrurus（Dicrurus）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联28种鸟类，如古铜色卷尾、小盘尾、鸦嘴卷尾等28种鸟类。
